summary: Iteration 73 - Frontend testing of 'Dette caisse → Gérante' section in CurrentAccountsTab. All features verified successfully. The new read-only view displays gerante advances in the Compte courant tab with proper KPIs, filtering, and history table.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - This is a React internal warning that doesn't affect functionality but could be cleaned up by removing wrapper spans in the table body mapping

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend: CurrentAccountsTab.jsx correctly implements the 'Dette caisse → Gérante' section with all required data-testid attributes
Frontend: KPIs (EN COURS, REMBOURSÉES (VUE), TOTAL CUMULÉ, STATUT) display correctly with proper values
Frontend: Filter select (data-testid='gerante-filter') has all 3 options: 'Dettes en cours', 'Remboursées', 'Tout l'historique'
Frontend: History table (data-testid='gerante-history') shows all required columns: Date, Motif, Montant, Statut, Remboursée le, Par
Frontend: Badge styling correct - 'En cours' (purple bg-purple-500/20), 'Remboursée' (green bg-emerald-500/20)
Frontend: 'Gérer' button (data-testid='gerante-manage-link') correctly navigates to Point de la Caisse tab

success_rate.backend: N/A (skipped per request - already tested in iteration 72)

seed_data_creation: Pre-seeded data used: 1 pending advance (5000 F) + 4 reimbursed advances
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 verified the new 'Dette caisse → Gérante' read-only view in CurrentAccountsTab. This section displays gerante advances (created in Point de la Caisse) with filtering and history. Key data-testids: gerante-debt-card, gerante-filter, gerante-manage-link, gerante-toggle-history, gerante-history, gerante-debt-row-{id}. The feature is read-only - management is done in Point de la Caisse tab.
